_README: Manual overrides for items the pipeline gets wrong. Keyed by decorID (string). Fields here overwrite the enriched item dict. Field names must match what output_catalog_lua.py reads: sources (array), achievement, vendor, quest, zone, npcX, npcY, npcID, faction, etc. See docs/WOWHEAD_EXTRACTION.md for the workflow.
_SCHEMA: Each entry SHOULD include: _note (one-line description); _reason (one of: in_game_verified, zone_fixup, achievement_fix, wowhead_wrong); _verified_date (YYYY-MM-DD). Fields starting with _ are ignored by the merge.

7690._note: Altar of the Corrupted Flames — in-game dump tagged as Vendor but this actually requires the Broken Isles World Quests V achievement

839._note: Inert Blight Canister — vendor in Dazar'alor, not broad Zuldazar

932._note: Forsaken War Planning Table — vendor in Dazar'alor

938._note: Small Forsaken War Tent — vendor in Dazar'alor

940._note: Blightfire Hanging Lantern — vendor in Dazar'alor

943._note: Undercity Spiked Chest — vendor (Captain Zen'taga) in Dazar'alor

949._note: Large Forsaken Spiked Brazier — vendor (Provisioner Mukra) in Dazar'alor

21602._note: Sin'dorei Garden Swing — sold by Disguised Decor Duel Vendor in Silvermoon City. Wowhead's visible UI does not render this vendor for the item (orphan JSON only), so the auto-promotion filter correctly rejects it; manual override re-attributes based on in-game confirmation.

22006._note: Small Lumber Pile — sold by Disguised Decor Duel Vendor in Silvermoon City. Same orphan-JSON situation as Sin'dorei Garden Swing.
